raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help be limited to sentence-level polish, or should it include restructuring and reframing the section's argument?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The section contains competing formulations of the central contribution, so helping may require reframing the thesis and contribution claim.","R1.2":"The delegation plausibly includes checking whether the argument coherently moves from accuracy gains to calibration-centered claims.","R1.5":"Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a section centrally includes improving grammar, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Uncertainty must be disclosed because the terse delegation leaves the intended kind of help underdetermined.","RX.2":"The projection must avoid assigning unsupported responsibilities beyond what the delegation and artifact justify.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually revise or critique the section.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid encouraging changes that could distort scientific claims or mislead downstream readers.","RX.5":"The rationale should trace each active responsibility to cues in the delegation or artifact."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help be limited to sentence-level polish, or should it include restructuring and reframing the section's argument?

rationale.R1.1: The section contains competing formulations of the central contribution, so helping may require reframing the thesis and contribution claim.
rationale.R1.2: The delegation plausibly includes checking whether the argument coherently moves from accuracy gains to calibration-centered claims.
rationale.R1.5: Because the request targets an entire section, section-level ordering and narrative arc are central possible responsibilities.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a section centrally includes improving grammar, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty must be disclosed because the terse delegation leaves the intended kind of help underdetermined.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must avoid assigning unsupported responsibilities beyond what the delegation and artifact justify.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within responsibility projection and not actually revise or critique the section.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid encouraging changes that could distort scientific claims or mislead downstream readers.
rationale.RX.5: The rationale should trace each active responsibility to cues in the delegation or artifact.
